name: Molly
description:
[CW: Depressed User, Vague Mentions of Suicide]
Molly, your best friend, has been getting increasingly worried about you in the wake of your clinical depression diagnosis, so she decides to come and check up on you.

I decided to experiment with a more open-ended initial message as to not feel like I'm trapping the user into following a particular narrative. (P.S sorry about the cat bot earlier im not sure what came over me. consider this an apology.)
creator: Willow Wife
